ocr.dialogSubtitle: Upload 1–5 screenshots. We'll read them and fill the form.
ocr.drop: Drop images here or click to choose
ocr.dropHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, HEIC. Up to 5 files, 5 MB each.
ocr.platformUnknown: Could not detect a platform — used Uber parser as fallback

warning.OCR_PAID_KM_INFERRED_FROM_TOTAL: Paid distance was assumed to equal total distance.
warning.OCR_DISTANCE_IS_PAID_KM: The distance shown by the app is the with-passenger (paid) km only. Total km starts at the same value — edit it if you tracked empty km separately.
warning.OCR_WAITING_FEE_DETECTED: A waiting-fee line was detected — actual earnings may exceed fare.
warning.OCR_INDRIVE_NO_COMMISSION_LINE: inDrive screenshots usually don't show a commission line — assumed 0.
warning.OCR_DURATION_FROM_TIMESTAMPS: Duration derived from start/end times because no duration line was found.
warning.OCR_TIME_AMBIGUOUS: Time was ambiguous between AM and PM.
warning.OCR_PLATFORM_UNKNOWN: Could not detect the platform — values may be less accurate.
warning.OCR_VALUE_CONFLICT_grossEgp: Different fare values appeared on the screenshots; took the most confident one.
warning.OCR_VALUE_CONFLICT_receivedEgp: Different received amounts appeared; took the most confident one.
warning.OCR_VALUE_CONFLICT_totalKm: Different distance values appeared on the screenshots; took the most confident one.
warning.OCR_VALUE_CONFLICT_durationSec: Different durations appeared; took the most confident one.
warning.OCR_LOW_CONFIDENCE_grossEgp: Fare confidence is low — review the value.
warning.OCR_LOW_CONFIDENCE_totalKm: Distance confidence is low — review the value.
warning.OCR_LOW_CONFIDENCE_startedAt: Start time confidence is low — review the value.
warning.OCR_LOW_CONFIDENCE_endedAt: End time confidence is low — review the value.
warning.OCR_OUT_OF_RANGE_received: Received looks unusually higher than the fare — review.
warning.OCR_END_BEFORE_START: End time appears before start time — review.
warning.OCR_DURATION_TOO_LONG: Duration is longer than 12 hours — review.
warning.OCR_RATE_PER_KM_HIGH: Fare per km is unusually high — review.
warning.OCR_RATE_PER_KM_LOW: Fare per km is unusually low — review.
warning.OCR_FUTURE_TIMESTAMP: The trip date is in the future — review.
warning.OCR_TIMESTAMP_TOO_OLD: The trip date is more than 90 days old — review.

error.OCR_NO_IMAGES: Please attach at least one screenshot.
error.OCR_TOO_MANY_IMAGES: You can upload at most 5 screenshots.
error.OCR_IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: Each image must be 5 MB or smaller.
error.OCR_TIMEOUT: OCR took too long. Please retry with smaller images.
error.OCR_BUSY: Server is busy. Please retry in a moment.
error.OCR_NOT_READY: OCR engine is starting up. Please retry in a moment.

guide.title: How to use Ehsbha
guide.subtitle: A short, friendly tour — from zero to knowing your real profit per kilometer.
guide.heroBody: Ehsbha turns every trip into clear numbers — profit, cost, hours, distance — so you decide where, when and how to drive smartly.
guide.stepsSubtitle: Less than 5 minutes — and your dashboard comes alive.

vehicle.title: Add your vehicle
vehicle.body: Settings → Vehicles → Add. Enter make, model, tank size, and average km/L.

apps.title: Add your apps
apps.body: Settings → Apps → Add. Pick Uber, inDrive, Talabat etc., or add a Custom one.

trip.title: Log your first trip
trip.body: Trips → Add. Required fields: vehicle, app, start/end time, gross, total/paid km.
trip.example: Tip: enter "Received after fees" — commission is calculated automatically.

see.title: See your real numbers
see.body: Dashboard shows today's net profit, profit/km, profit/hour and decisions for tomorrow.
see.example: After 3–7 trips you'll get a driver score and personal tips.

guide.featuresSubtitle: Each page solves one question — pick the one you need.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: One screen with today's profit, distance, hours and smart decisions.

trips.title: Trips
trips.body: Log every trip and edit later. Auto-calc for commission and empty km.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.body: Track rent, fines, food and recurring costs — split by category.

vehicleHealth.title: Vehicle health
vehicleHealth.body: True cost per km from fuel + oil + tires + brakes + battery + monthly overhead.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Trends per day/week/month/app/area/hour — find what really pays.

driverScore.title: Driver score
driverScore.body: Efficiency, profit, safety and consistency. Add a wellness check for better safety.

decisions.title: Smart decisions
decisions.body: Personal tips: switch app, change area, take a break — based on your numbers.

planner.title: Work planner
planner.body: Monthly goal tracker — how much per day/hour to hit your target.

bestHours.title: Best hours
bestHours.body: Which hours earn you the most? Morning/afternoon/evening/night breakdown.

simulator.title: Profit simulator
simulator.body: What-if calculator: change km/hours/commission/fuel and see net profit instantly.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.body: Track services done + see what's due next based on your vehicle's km.

goals.title: Goals
goals.body: Set monthly/weekly targets — the planner tells you what's needed daily.

guide.tipsSubtitle: The cleaner your inputs, the smarter your insights.

tips.daily: Log trips daily — memory fades and weekly batches lose accuracy.
tips.received: Always enter "Received" to auto-calc commission correctly.
tips.kmBoth: Track both total + paid km — empty km drives true cost analysis.
tips.expenses: Add fuel + recurring expenses (rent, insurance) for true net profit.
tips.vehicleCosts: Configure vehicle costs (Vehicle health → Configure) — without them, profit/km is overstated.
tips.wellness: Fill the wellness check daily — even briefly. Safety score depends on it.
tips.goals: Set a realistic monthly goal — the planner suggests daily targets to hit it.

guide.faqSubtitle: Tap a question to see the answer.

profit.a: Net = Gross + Tips − Commission − Tolls − Parking − Fuel cost (from km × your vehicle's km/L × current price) − Other expenses for the day.

score.q: Why does my driver score look low?
score.a: Score compares today to your 14-day median. A loss day, missing trips, or short history can drop it. The more trips you log, the more accurate it gets.

commission.q: Do I have to type the commission for every trip?
commission.a: No. Enter "Received after fees" and commission is calculated as Gross − Received. Or leave it auto and we use your app's default %.

vehicleCost.a: It's fuel + oil + tires + brakes + (battery, chain for bikes) + monthly overhead, divided by the km those parts last. Configure costs once and it's accurate forever.

offline.q: Can I use Ehsbha without internet?
offline.a: Yes. It's a Progressive Web App — install it from the browser menu (or the install banner), and most pages work offline.

data.q: Is my data shared with my apps (Uber, inDrive…)?
data.a: No. Your data stays in Ehsbha. We don't have an integration with any ride-share platform — you enter trips yourself.

language.a: Yes — tap the AR/EN toggle in the top bar, or change it from Settings → Appearance.

delete.q: How do I delete a trip or expense?
delete.a: Open the entry, tap the red Delete button, and confirm. Aggregates and scores update automatically.

guide.ctaFooter: Ready? Log your first trip and watch the numbers light up.

dataQuality.label: Data quality
dataQuality.low: Score needs more trips to be reliable

tips.title: How to improve
tips.lowEfficiency: Try working different areas or hours — your profit/km is below your usual.
tips.lowProfit: Check expenses + fuel costs. Net profit is below your typical day.
tips.lowSafety: Fatigue is high. Take a 15-min break every 2 hours and avoid driving over 10 hours/day.
tips.lowConsistency: Try to keep your shift length similar each day. Big variance lowers consistency.
tips.lowSleep: You slept under 6 hours. Aim for 7+ for safer driving.
tips.tooLong: You've driven over 3 hours straight without a break.
tips.noWaterRest: Drink water every hour and rest if you can.
